steps.title: Find the constant m using the given condition
steps.content:
We know that when x = 100 shirts, the total cost is \$800. Substitute into $c(x) = mx + 500$:
$$800 = m(100) + 500$$
$$800 - 500 = 100m$$
$$m = 3$$

steps.title: Calculate the cost for 1000 shirts
steps.content:
Substitute x = 1000 and $m = 3$ into the function:
$$c(1000) = 3(1000) + 500$$
$$c(1000) = 3000 + 500 = 3500$$
The total cost to produce 1000 shirts is 3500 dollars.
